site_description: A few apps I made instead of paying for subscriptions. Friends & family only.
hero_eyebrow: my apps · no VC money was harmed
hero_tagline: I built some apps because every SaaS wanted €9/mo for basic math. Now they live here, on a €5 server in Mannheim. You're welcome to use them.
apps_sub: Two work, three are somewhere between "almost" and "I'll finish it this month, I swear." Each lives on your home screen like a real app.
app_finance_desc: Where my money goes. Warns me before rent and the dentist team up to ruin my week.
app_calorie_desc: A quiet ledger of what I eat. No streaks, no shaming, no green smoothie ads.
app_gym_desc: So I stop texting myself "100kg squat" and losing it in the chat.
app_time_desc: Receipts for my week. Timers, recaps, exports. For when freelancing gets real.
app_pomodoro_desc: 25 on, 5 off. Won't negotiate. Won't sync to anyone's cloud. Won't upsell you.
app_time_meta: Q3 maybe · the timer UI haunts me
cta_invite_hint: invite-only · poke Kevin if you don't have one
install_heading: Put it on your home screen.
install_sub: The secret: your phone can pin web apps as real icons. No app store, no updates to approve, no 200MB download for a calculator.
install_step1_body: Not Chrome, not Firefox. Safari. Apple said so, not me.
install_step2_body: The square with the arrow. Bottom of the screen. You've seen it 400 times.
install_step3_body: Scroll the share sheet. It's hiding in there. Tap it, confirm, done.
install_step4_title: That's it — it's an app now
install_step4_body: Full screen, no URL bar, its own icon. Indistinguishable from native. Almost.
install_android_step1_body: Or any modern browser, honestly. Firefox works. Samsung Internet too.
install_android_step2_body: Three dots, top-right. The universal symbol of "there's more."
install_android_step3_body: Wording depends on browser. Tap it, confirm, done.
install_android_step4_body: Real app icon, real fullscreen, real no-nag. Same vibe as native.
about_heading: A weekend project that won't die.
about_sub: Started as a finance tracker. Then I thought "well, the server's already running..." and now there's a whole monorepo. Oops.
about_built_desc: Costs me less than a coffee/month. One repo, shared tokens, each app gets its own color. That's the whole architecture slide.
about_rules_title: No signups. No ads. No growth metrics.
about_rules_desc: You get in when I send you a link. If I haven't — ask nicely or bribe with food.
about_who_title: People I'd lend my charger to.
about_who_desc: Friends, family, people who won't file a GDPR request as a joke. If you found this by accident — hi! Nothing here for you, but nice URL huh?
about_wont_title: Track you. Charge you. Add AI.
about_wont_desc: No analytics, no "premium tier", no newsletter, no dark patterns. If I break this promise you can have my airfryer.
footer_copy: © 2026 Nexo · self-hosted from Mannheim · runs on caffeine
apps_footer_wink: made by Kevin, for the people he likes
appgrid_empty: No apps unlocked yet. Ask Kevin to hook you up.
settings_display_name_desc: Used in greetings and shared debt items.
settings_email_desc: Sign-in identity. One per Nexo account.
settings_theme_desc: Dark mode arrives when it earns the bug count.
settings_export_desc: .zip of all apps, JSON + CSV. Yours, always.
sheet_name_sub: Used in greetings and shared items across all your apps.
sheet_name_hint: Just a first name works. Friends see this in Finance debts and shared items.
sheet_email_sub: Your sign-in identity. Changing it requires verification.
sheet_week_sub: Used by calendars, the Finance week-strip, and weekly summaries.
sheet_theme_sub: Currently light-only — dark mode is on the maybe-later list.
sheet_theme_light_desc: The only one that exists, for now.
sheet_theme_dark_desc: Coming when it earns the bug count.
sheet_backups_sub: Daily snapshot of every app's data.
sheet_export_sub: One zip with every app's data. Open it on your laptop with anything that reads JSON or CSV.
sheet_export_inside_finance: Finance · accounts, transactions, expenses, debts (CSV + JSON)
sheet_export_inside_audit: Audit log · every change you've made
sheet_audit_sub: Every state-changing thing that's happened to your data.
sheet_signout_sub: You'll be signed out from every Nexo app on this device. Your data stays where it is.
sessions_sub: Where you're signed in right now.
appdesc_finance: Track accounts, categorize spend, see where the month went.
appdesc_flaschen: Refreshes the shift portal so I don't have to. Pings the moment a good one drops.
appdesc_calorie: A quiet ledger of what I eat. No streaks, no shaming.
appdesc_admin: Services, users, logs — the control room.
appdesc_gym: Log lifts, watch the progressive overload curve. Built for the once-a-week strength routine I keep forgetting to write down.
appmeta_gym: eta: when I stop missing leg day
appdesc_time: Receipts for your week. Project timers + a calendar view + invoice-ready exports.
appmeta_time: eta: q3 · stuck on the timer UI
